subcodes.first_line: Praise and thanksgiving which hath been revealed from the Tongue of Grandeur belong exclusively to His sacred Being, and if from the letter Shín [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و شکر که از لسان عظمت ظاهر مخصوص ذات مقدسش بوده و هست و اگر از حرف شین
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @chastisement and requital, @exhortations and counsels, @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement
